mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID ,NOTI_DIV_CD ,NOTI_APY_DATE ,NOTI_TRT_STTUS_CD ,NOTI_SND_DT ,NOTI_WAY_CD ,NOTI_CD ,CRET_IP ,CRET_DT ,CRET_ID ,AMD_IP ,AMD_DT ,AMD_ID ,NM ,MOBILE_NO FROM NMCP_APY_NOTI_TXN WHERE 1=1 AND (SUBSTR(NOTI_APY_DATE,0,8) = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') OR SUBSTR(NOTI_APY_DATE,0,8) = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE+30,'YYYYMMDD')) AND NOTI_TRT_STTUS_CD = 'A'
mapper.update: UPDATE NMCP_APY_NOTI_TXN SET NOTI_TRT_STTUS_CD = #{notiTrtSttusCd} ,NOTI_SND_DT = SYSDATE ,NOTI_WAY_CD = 'TALK' ,NOTI_CD = 'NOTI001' ,AMD_IP = #{amdIp} ,AMD_DT = SYSDATE ,AMD_ID = 'BATCH' WHERE MOBILE_NO = #{mobileNo} AND NOTI_DIV_CD = 'NOTI001' AND NOTI_TRT_STTUS_CD = 'A' AND SUBSTR(NOTI_APY_DATE,0,8) = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM NMCP_APY_NOTI_TXN WHERE NOTI_TRT_STTUS_CD IN ('C','S','F') AND ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(NOTI_APY_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),3) < SYSDATE
